overall.description: Game footage from an action RPG (Black Myth: Wukong) showing a monkey warrior character exploring a dimly lit temple shrine with a massive ceremonial gong, then transitioning into a vast underground cave system called Webbed Hollow. The character navigates through bioluminescent grottos, spider-web covered passages, and ancient stone monuments in a high-fidelity Unreal Engine 5 environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient temple interior with ceremonial gong

events.description: character finishes ascending stone stairs and continues forward on flat ground
screen fades to black, transitioning from temple to cave environment

agents.ego_description: monkey warrior character walking up stone steps and approaching a large ancient gong mounted on a wooden platform

entered.detail: wide stone steps leading up to the temple platform
massive circular bronze gong mounted on wooden frame with intricate carvings
thick dark wooden support columns with traditional joinery
raised wooden platform with lit candles and offerings
small warm light sources providing ambient illumination

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit traditional temple with wooden architecture. The monkey warrior character ascends a flight of stone stairs toward a massive ancient gong, passing thick wooden pillars. Warm candlelight flickers around the altar platform as the character approaches the ceremonial instrument, before the scene fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep cave tunnel with bioluminescent cocoons

events.description: emerges from black screen into dark cave system labeled 'Webbed Hollow'
discovers cluster of glowing orange cocoons and bioluminescent eggs along the cave wall

agents.ego_description: cautiously walking through the dark cavern, observing the glowing biological formations on the walls

entered.detail: dark rocky passage extending into the distance with uneven walls
rock formations hanging from the cave ceiling
large pulsating orange bioluminescent pods clustered against the rock wall
rough dark stone surfaces with moisture and mineral deposits

segments.scene_description: The character enters the Webbed Hollow, a dark underground cave system illuminated by sparse torchlight. The environment features rough rocky walls and stalactites hanging from the ceiling. As the character explores deeper, clusters of glowing orange cocoons and bioluminescent eggs become visible along the left wall, casting an eerie warm glow on the damp cave floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cave passage with spider webs and ancient stone monuments

events.description: encounters massive thick spider webs spanning across the cave passage
narrow passage opens into vast underground cavern with distant blue light

agents.ego_description: navigating through web-covered corridors and approaching ancient stone structures

entered.detail: thick dense cobwebs stretching across the cave corridor
ancient carved stone stele and pillars with weathered surfaces
burning torches mounted on iron brackets attached to the cave walls
massive open chamber with distant blue ambient light and rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character progresses deeper into the cave system, passing through passages draped with massive spider webs. Wall-mounted torches provide warm flickering light against the stone. Ancient carved monuments and stele appear on the right side of the path. The narrow corridor eventually opens into a vast underground cavern with mysterious blue light glowing in the distant background, revealing the massive scale of the Webbed Hollow.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dimly lit traditional temple that culminates in a transition toward darkness. It begins with the monkey warrior ascending a flight of stone stairs, moving past thick wooden pillars that frame the architecture. As the character climbs, the scene shifts toward a flickering altar platform where warm candlelight illuminates the surroundings. The camera then follows the warrior as he approaches a massive ancient gong, before the environment finally fades into a complete black void.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark, claustrophobic cave system that gradually expands into a massive, bioluminescent underground cavern. It begins as the character enters the Webbed Hollow, navigating through rough rocky walls and stalactites illuminated by sparse torchlight. As the character explores deeper, the environment shifts to reveal clusters of glowing orange cocoons and bioluminescent eggs that cast an eerie warmth across the damp floor. The scene then progresses through narrow passages draped in massive spider webs and past ancient carved monuments, with flickering wall torches guiding the way. Finally, the corridor opens wide to reveal the immense scale of the hollow, shifting the perspective toward a distant, mysterious blue glow emanating from the depths of the cavern.
